name: Display Menu → Right
description: This is an [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) usually wired to the right button of the joystick. In the `joystick` mode it is used to set the next value or to increment the numeric one; depending on the `immediate_edit` flag entering the edit mode is required or not. In both modes it can be also used to enter the submenu when used with the `menu` menu item.
